name: Vlf: Super Bowl Brownies
recipeInstructions:
These brownies are extremely low in fat and have a slightly bitter, dark chocolate flavor rather than the milk-chocolate sweetness of most brownies. If you love chocolate, these make a great treat!
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, cocoa powder, salt, baking powder, and packed brown sugar.
2. In a small bowl, beat together the vanilla extract, almond extract, egg whites at room temperature, and honey until creamy.
3. Combine the wet and dry ingredients in the large bowl and mix well to ensure an even distribution of ingredients.
4. Pour the batter into a 13 x 9 baking pan sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes at 375°F (350°F if using a glass pan), or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with fudgy crumbs.
6. Do not overbake! Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into pieces. You can add chopped nuts, but this will significantly increase the fat content.
